2243590.name: Forge Horizon
2243590.description:
Forge Horizon is an action-packed multiplayer 3rd-Person shooter that combines intense combat with a wide variety of player customization options. Players can customize their characters to stand out in the battlefield, and choose from a huge selection of high-quality weapons and equipment. The game features fast-paced gameplay, giving players the opportunity to take on enemies at lightning speed. It's fun, immersive gameplay makes it the perfect choice for anyone looking for a thrilling shooter.

The arcade-style approach makes the game easy to pick up and start playing right away. You won’t have to spend hours trying to figure out the controls or how to progress in the game. You can customize your weapons and armor by selecting, upgrading, or crafting them. With constant running, dodging, and shooting, Forge Horizon offers an intense gaming experience. You’ll find yourself constantly challenged as you battle against enemies from all angles.
2243590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
